title: citrus mutabilis
intro: Citrus mutabilis, also known as the Chinese button orange or button mandarin, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Citrus mutabilis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as tea, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in aromatherapy for its calming and uplifting properties.
